title: Gaius
summary: Gaius, sometimes spelled Caius, was a common Latin praenomen; see Gaius (praenomen).
text:
Gaius, sometimes spelled Caius, was a common Latin praenomen; see Gaius (praenomen).

Gaius (jurist) (fl. 130–180), Roman jurist

Gaius Claudius Marcellus Minor (88–40 BC), consul in 50 BC
